---
title: "A | Thema 7"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
## Strukturgleichungsmodell mit Mediation

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(psych))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")
 
View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "ã (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
```

### PrûÊsentation

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ============================================================================
# Thema 07: Latente Regression und Strukturgleichungsmodell
# Datensatz: PoliticalDemocracy (lavaan, N=75)
# ============================================================================

library(lavaan)
library(lavaanPlot)

data(PoliticalDemocracy)
dat <- PoliticalDemocracy

# ---- PRûSENTATION: VollstûÊndiges SEM ----

model_full <- '
  # Messmodelle
  ind60 =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  dem60 =~ y1 + y2 + y3 + y4
  dem65 =~ y5 + y6 + y7 + y8

  # Strukturmodell (Regressionen)
  dem60 ~ ind60
  dem65 ~ ind60 + dem60

  # Korrelierte Residuen (gleiche Indikatoren û¥ber Zeit)
  y1 ~~ y5
  y2 ~~ y4 + y6
  y3 ~~ y7
  y4 ~~ y8
  y6 ~~ y8
'

fit_full <- sem(model_full, data = dat)
summary(fit_full, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# Pfaddiagramm
lavaanPlot(model = fit_full,   
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE) 

# Fit-Indizes
fitMeasures(fit_full, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "tli",
                         "rmsea", "rmsea.ci.lower", "rmsea.ci.upper", "srmr"))

# Standardisierte Pfadkoeffizienten
standardizedSolution(fit_full)[standardizedSolution(fit_full)$op == "~", ]


```

## Bericht

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ---- BERICHT: Modellvergleiche und Mediation ----

# Modell ohne direkten Effekt ind60 ã dem65
model_nodir <- '
  ind60 =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  dem60 =~ y1 + y2 + y3 + y4
  dem65 =~ y5 + y6 + y7 + y8
  dem60 ~ ind60
  dem65 ~ dem60    # kein direkter Effekt von ind60!
  y1 ~~ y5; y2 ~~ y4 + y6; y3 ~~ y7; y4 ~~ y8; y6 ~~ y8
'
fit_nodir <- sem(model_nodir, data = dat)

# Modell ohne korrelierte Residuen
model_nocorr <- '
  ind60 =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  dem60 =~ y1 + y2 + y3 + y4
  dem65 =~ y5 + y6 + y7 + y8
  dem60 ~ ind60
  dem65 ~ ind60 + dem60
'
fit_nocorr <- sem(model_nocorr, data = dat)

# Vergleichstabelle
models <- list("Voll (mit dir. Effekt + korr. Residuen)" = fit_full,
               "Ohne direkten Effekt" = fit_nodir,
               "Ohne korrelierte Residuen" = fit_nocorr)
fit_comp <- sapply(models, function(f) {
  fitMeasures(f, c("chisq", "df", "cfi", "rmsea", "aic", "bic"))
})
round(t(fit_comp), 3)

# Chi-Quadrat-Differenztest
anova(fit_nodir, fit_full)  # ist der direkte Effekt nûÑtig?

# Mediation: Indirekter Effekt mit Bootstrap
fit_med <- sem(model_full, data = dat, se = "bootstrap", bootstrap = 1000)
parameterEstimates(fit_med, boot.ci.type = "perc")[
  parameterEstimates(fit_med)$op == "~", c("lhs", "op", "rhs", "est", "ci.lower", "ci.upper")]

# Indirekter Effekt manuell definieren
model_indirect <- '
  ind60 =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  dem60 =~ y1 + y2 + y3 + y4
  dem65 =~ y5 + y6 + y7 + y8

  dem60 ~ a*ind60
  dem65 ~ b*dem60 + c*ind60

  y1 ~~ y5; y2 ~~ y4 + y6; y3 ~~ y7; y4 ~~ y8; y6 ~~ y8

  # Definierte Parameter
  indirect := a*b
  total    := c + a*b
'
fit_indirect <- sem(model_indirect, data = dat, se = "bootstrap", bootstrap = 1000)
parameterEstimates(fit_indirect, boot.ci.type = "perc")[
  parameterEstimates(fit_indirect)$op == ":=", ]

```
